positive: Minimalist geometric celestial forest scene, featuring stylized trees with leaf patterns resembling constellations and glowing abstract nebulas forming ground cover. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, with strong, contrasting silhouettes of the flora against a deep twilight sky that transitions from indigo to vibrant magenta. Use a limited, harmonious color palette: deep sapphire blue, electric teal, celestial gold, and black. The overall mood should be ethereal, dreamlike, and sophisticated, optimized for clean apparel printing with clear lines and solid color areas. Vector art aesthetic, detailed line work, flat graphic design style, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, signature, text, watermark, noisy, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, copyright, logos, trademarks, celebrity, photo-realistic
